frontMatter.title: Running Kotlin Code in VSCode
frontMatter.summary: Suppose you want to test some Kotlin code, but it is too simple for you so you don't want to create a project in your IDE and it also too complex to put it in your REPL

prev.title: Domain Name Resolution with /etc/hosts
